document.source_title: Rajat Patidar ruled out of RCB’s IPL 2026 clash against PBKS

claims.claim_text: Rajat Patidar missed the IPL 2026 clash against Punjab Kings.
claims.evidence_text: Royal Challengers Bengaluru captain Rajat Patidar missed the team’s crucial IPL 2026 clash against Punjab Kings in Dharamshala on Sunday.

claims.claim_text: Jitesh Sharma stepped in to lead RCB in Patidar's absence.
claims.evidence_text: vice-captain Jitesh Sharma stepping in to lead the side.

claims.claim_text: Patidar is expected to return for the final league game against Sunrisers Hyderabad.
claims.evidence_text: Jitesh confirmed that Patidar would be back of the team’s final league game against Sunrisers Hyderabad on Friday.
